items.title: Schedule catch-up with Boris (Blast Security) to discuss their fundraising round
items.context: Email from Richie on Jun 10: 'Apologies for the delay here, Boris. Do you have availability this week?' — Boris had previously said he'd love to catch up Friday or Monday to discuss the round.

items.title: Confirm meeting time with Idan Basre (brava.security) introduced by Barak Perelman (Opti CEO)
items.context: Email from Lissette on Jun 10 offering time slots: Mon Jun 15 (10-11:30am, 1:30pm, 3-5pm ET), Tue Jun 16 (10-1:30pm, 3:30-5pm ET), Wed Jun 17 (10-11am, 11:30am, 1pm or 3pm ET). Waiting for Idan's response.

items.title: Leverage SMBC meeting on Jun 15 to push Echelon AI intro to Gordon
items.context: Calendar event 'SMBC <> Fin Capital' on Jun 15 at SF office with Yuji Ogata and Dawn Berry from SMBC. Echelon AI next_steps: 'Pushing for intro to SMBC (Gordon)' — the upcoming SMBC meeting is an opportunity to facilitate this.

items.title: Prep for SMBC Cyber Security Trend meeting at Fin Capital SF office
items.context: Calendar event 'SMBC <> Fin Capital - Meeting for Cyber Security Trend' on Jun 15 at 1 Sansome St Suite 3950. Attendees include SMBC (Yuji Ogata, Dawn Berry), Fin Capital (Jake, Derek, Fan, Daria, Logan), and JRI America (Yuko Tazuki).
